title: Value ledger: recall, stale-withheld, caller-answered + replay receipts (v2.2.0)
summary: Ledger at .agent memory/reports/value.json records recall served, stale withheld, caller answered, stale caught; valueSummary windows feed kage gains and the viewer Gains tab; $ at ~15/1M tokens. v2.2.0 additions: recall
body: Ledger at .agent_memory/reports/value.json records recall_served, stale_withheld, caller_answered, stale_caught; valueSummary windows feed kage gains and the viewer Gains tab; $ at ~15/1M tokens. v2.2.0 additions: recall_served events carry replay_tokens (sum of served packets' discovery_tokens minus context cost) and receipts report max(read-vs-source, replay); kage gains prints a Knowledge replay value line; non-empty kage file-context injections also record events.
